0.details:
The good memories: late nights, fun moments, camp fires and all our adventuers!
The bad memories, our life lessons, our struggles
We will miss her dearly.
She was an amazing person, someone that cares for you, brightens up every moment, literally there was never a dull moment when she was around. She would scold at us but secretly laugh.
You can't forget her smile.
We gained an angel. We have someone that will always look out for us.
Do you remember that day when Matt fell, when he tried catching himself in mid air, like five times, your mom laugh so loud that she fell in the process.
She had a big heart, always helping people, always making sure everyone is fine. She surely made sure we were fed and full.
0.model_generation:
Dear friends and family,

My heart aches as I remember her bright spirit and generous heart. From late nights around the campfire to our wild adventures, there was never a dull moment when she was near. She would scold us when we needed it most, then laugh behind her hand, that unforgettable smile lighting up the night.

We faced struggles and shared hard-earned life lessons, and through it all she stood by our side. I still laugh at the memory of Matt’s spectacular mid-air flail—her laughter rang out so hard she toppled herself. She cared for everyone, always making sure we were fed, safe, and never alone. Though we grieve her passing, we’ve gained an angel who will forever watch over us.

We will miss her dearly, but take comfort in the love and joy she gifted to every life she touched.

With love and sympathy,
0.final_version:
Dear Drew, 

My friend, my brother, my life, we didn't lose her, but we gained a angel in heaven that will always look out for you, for us and everyone. 

Today, I want to remind you of how great of a person your mother was. Oh, how big of a heart she had, always happy, always caring and looking out for everyone and oh boy, we cannot forget her lame jokes that she would tell us and her laughter filling the room. 

Our advertures we had, she always came up with new ideas and got us to go to new places to explore. Some would say she was a "dare devil" at her old age, but she kept everyone happy. I can clearly see her mischievous face when I think about her. 

Everything feels empty without her, it feels like the walls are caving in, everything feels like a bad dream, I wish I could wake up and smell her pancakes and bacon for breakfast. I wish we appreciated the time more, I wish she would slap the back of my head one more time when doing something wrong. 

She will be remembered by many. 

Please accept my heartfelt condolences during this time. 
Dani

1.details:
I want to remind about our three G's
God: Question yourself - where's your faith right now? Do you believe in God? Have you reflected on previous difficlut times God has brought you through? Is your heart telling you to pray?
Goals: Who is going to buy you things you like if you don't achieve your goals? Why did you start this goal in the first place? What would you like to achieve?
Grow: How far have you come? What did you achive? How did you feel when you overcame a diicult time?
Difficult time, but realized you could moveforward: remember the time you thought Benny was the one for you? Oh what a time! I watched you use four boxes of my tissues! We switched from romantic movies to action movies.
1.model_generation:
No matter how tough things feel right now, you’re not alone. Life throws curveballs, but our three G’s guide us: God, Goals, Grow.

God: Where is your faith? Reflect on storms He’s carried you through, and let your heart lead you to prayer.

Goals: Who will get you what you want if you don’t achieve them? Remember why you started and the dreams that fuel you.

Grow: Look how far you’ve come. Celebrate each victory, big or small. How did it feel when you overcame a difficult time before? Recall the rush of overcoming challenges and know you can do it again.

Remember when you thought Benny was the one? Four boxes of tissues and a switch from romantic dramas to nonstop action proved your resilience. You moved forward then, and you’ll move forward now. Keep your faith strong, stay focused on your goals, and embrace your growth. You’ve got this!
1.final_version:
Laura the lion! Oh, that never gets old. 

Today I want to remind you about all the bad memories - your first break-up, your second break-up, your third break-up, your fourth break-up! The day you failed your exam, when you bought the wrong size dress for prom night, the day you lost your apartment keys and forgot your bags at the shopping mall all because you were over stimulated. You got through all these bad days, what tells you, you cannot make it through this difficult time? You are Laura the lion. You got over all the break-ups and someone that loves you and worship the ground you walk on, you went to go re-write your exam and did so much better than expected, you also got into your dream job right after, you blessed someone with the dress they needed and the day you lost your apartment keys and grocery bags was the day you learned to breath when everything feels too much. 

Now that I got that out of the way, I want to remind you about our three G's we need to reflect on when times get tough. 

Turning to God. When you feel like you are being swallowed by the earth, nothing is going your way, everything just feels wrong, take a moment to speak to God. Reflect on the past difficult experiences and ask yourself, "Has God ever left me in difficult times?", "How did I overcome such a difficult situation?", "Where do I stand with God?" and "Where is my faith?" 

Goals: Ask yourself, "What do I want?", "What is good for me?", "What do I need to do?"

Grow: Reflect on what you have achieved. What are you going to do differently this time around? 

You are Laura the Lion! You are strong and courageous. You can and will get over anything that comes into your path. 

I am here for you to support you and cry with you. I root for you!

2.details:
We have been together six years, I finally get to blow the dust off of this letter I wrote.
When I first met Matt I never liked him. He was the "play boys"  you get in cringy romantic movies or Wattpad books. The captin of the university soccer team.
We saw each other in school, but started speaking at a party. He wasn't so bad.
2.model_generation: Matt, I finally get to blow the dust off this letter I wrote six years ago. When I first met you, I never liked you. You were the playboy hero from every cringy romantic movie, the captain of the university soccer team. We exchanged glances in the hallways, but it wasn’t until that party that I discovered how kind and genuine you are. From the moment we started talking, my heart knew you were someone special. You’ve been my partner in laughter and my rock in stormy times. Today, I promise to love you fiercely and without reservation. I vow to support your dreams, celebrate your victories, and comfort you in moments of doubt. I promise to keep discovering new reasons to fall in love with you every day. I promise to cherish the life we build together, hand in hand, for all the days of our lives.
2.final_version: Matt, I finally get to blow the dust off this letter I wrote three years ago. When I first met you, I never liked you. You were the playboy hero from every cringy romantic movie, the captain of the university soccer team. We exchanged glances in the hallways, but it wasn’t until that party that I discovered how kind and genuine you are. From the moment we started talking, my heart knew you were someone special. You’ve been my partner in laughter and my rock in stormy times. Today, I promise to love you fiercely and without reservation. I vow to support your dreams, celebrate your victories, and comfort you in moments of doubt. I promise to keep discovering new reasons to fall in love with you every day. I promise to cherish the life we build together, hand in hand, for all the days of our lives.

3.details:
I am writing to my friend Laura.
I want to thank her for always showing up.
Nothing bad happened, but I want to express my appreciation toward her.
She makes me greatful for life.
Her voice fills a dull room. Every moment is vibrant.
She is a great person.
We both love documentaries, shopping, your normal girl things, but we also love adventures and exploring new places.
She's my strength when I can't seem to believe anymore.
Everyone loves her.
We keep a box of tissues between us on movie nights. We love our girl nights with takeouts, popcorn, face masks, etc
3.model_generation:
Dear Laura,

Thank you for always showing up. Your presence turns every dull moment into something vibrant. When your voice fills a room, it brightens even the simplest afternoons. I’m so grateful for life because of you.

I cherish our documentary marathons, our shopping sprees, and those normal-girl nights with takeout, popcorn, face masks, and our trusty box of tissues. Each adventure we share—whether exploring a new city or just wandering the neighborhood—reminds me how lucky I am to have you by my side. You’re my strength when I can’t believe in myself, and everyone who knows you admires your warmth and kindness.

Thank you for being such an amazing friend. Your loyalty and joy make me appreciate every day a little more. I look forward to many more girl nights, late-night talks, and spontaneous adventures together.

With love always,
Your friend
3.final_version:
Dear Laura,

Thank you for always showing up. Your presence turns every dull moment into something vibrant. When your voice fills a room, it brightens even the simplest afternoons. I’m so grateful for life because of you.

I cherish our documentary marathons, our shopping sprees, and those girl nights with takeout, popcorn, face masks, and our trusty box of tissues. Each adventure we share—whether exploring a new city or just wandering the neighborhood—reminds me how lucky I am to have you by my side. You’re my strength when I can’t believe in myself, and everyone who knows you admires your warmth and kindness.

Thank you for being such an amazing friend. Your loyalty and joy make me appreciate every day a little more. I look forward to many more girl nights, late-night talks, and spontaneous adventures together.

With love always,
Your friend

4.details:
I had a baby, I see you have two! They should definitely be friends. How we said we'll never get married and have children, look at us now.
I was cleaning out our attic and came across our university pictures. We were so young!
I hope we can get together soon.
I hope you and your family is keeping well.
4.model_generation:
Hi there,

I hope you and your family are keeping well. I recently had a baby and am loving every minute of this new adventure. I see you have two now and can’t wait for them to meet—they should definitely become friends. How funny that we once promised we’d never get married or have kids; look at us now, blissfully outnumbered by tiny humans. Last weekend I was cleaning out the attic when I came across our old university pictures. We were so young and carefree—it felt like a different lifetime. I’d love to get together soon, maybe for coffee or a park playdate so the little ones can run around. Let me know when you’re free. We have so much to share. Looking forward to catching up soon. Take care and give everyone a big hug from me.

Warmly,
4.final_version:
Hi there,

I hope you and your family are keeping well. I recently had a baby and am loving every minute of this new adventure. I see you have two now and can’t wait for them to meet—they should definitely become friends. How funny that we once promised we’d never get married or have kids; look at us now, blissfully outnumbered by tiny humans. Last weekend I was cleaning out the attic when I came across our old university pictures. We were so young and carefree—it felt like a different lifetime. I’d love to get together soon, maybe for coffee or a park playdate so the little ones can run around. Let me know when you’re free. We have so much to share. Looking forward to catching up soon. Take care and give everyone a big hug from me.

Warmly,

5.details:
Turning the big 30!
You look amazing and I wish many more years to come.
You are such a joy, thank you for being you.
May God always protect you, so that you can always share your love and make people smile.
Remember the time we went to the carnival and we felt sick because of the rides we went on, can you remember how we took 30 minute breaks and then just went on all of them again. We had so much candy that night.
When we had our first club experience whenyou turned 19. We dressed up n evening wear and everyone else was wearing casual clothes.
5.model_generation:
Happy 30th birthday! Today you step into a new decade looking more radiant than ever, and I can’t wait to see what the future holds for you. You have brought endless joy into our lives simply by being yourself. May God always protect you, so you can continue to share your love and bring smiles wherever you go.

I still laugh when I think back to that night at the carnival—how we both felt queasy after those wild rides, took thirty-minute breaks to recover, then dove back in for more, ending the night on a sugar high from all that candy. And who could forget our first club adventure at nineteen, dressed to the nines in evening wear while everyone else went casual? You owned the night.

Here’s to many more years of laughter, adventure, and happiness. You deserve all the best. Cheers to thirty and beyond!
5.final_version:
Happy 30th birthday! Today you step into a new decade looking more radiant than ever, and I can’t wait to see what the future holds for you. You have brought endless joy into our lives simply by being yourself. May God always protect you, so you can continue to share your love and bring smiles wherever you go.

I still laugh when I think back to that night at the carnival—how we both felt queasy after those wild rides, took thirty-minute breaks to recover, then dove back in for more, ending the night on a sugar high from all that candy. And who could forget our first club adventure at nineteen, dressed to the nines in evening wear while everyone else went casual? You owned the night.

Here’s to many more years of laughter, adventure, and happiness. You deserve all the best. Cheers to thirty and beyond!
